node.title: Uber Sde 1 Interview invites for Oa on 13th.

article.title: Uber Sde 1 Interview invites for Oa on 13th.
article.content:
Did people actually start receiving the invites for the BP round, just what was the criteria? Was thinking the invites might start from Monday after the 3 day weekend.

Uber does this everytime, even solving 3/3 does not get you an invite. Just what do these guys look for honestly.

post.content: Same bro, in the June OA I solved 3/3 and still didn\u2019t get shortlisted. Happened again this time
